_spec: SPEC §6.1 — drives the urgent-care banner and pathway suppression (§2.3).
_warning: ⚠️ VERIFY. Ships EMPTY and unverified. Populate ONLY from an authoritative, clinician-reviewed source. Do NOT fill from memory or model output. Set verified=true only after a named clinician signs off and every entry has reviewedBy + reviewedAt. While verified=false, critical escalation does not fire (SPEC §11 'behind a flag').
